title: ammophila longifolia
intro: Ammophila longifolia, also known as sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ammophila longifolia include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
